mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE bom_tree (id, item_code, item_name, unit, quantity, unit_price, level, parent_code, created_at, updated_at) AS ( SELECT id, item_code, item_name, unit, quantity, unit_price, level, parent_code, created_at, updated_at FROM bom_item WHERE item_code = #{rootCode} UNION ALL SELECT bi.id, bi.item_code, bi.item_name, bi.unit, bi.quantity, bi.unit_price, bi.level, bi.parent_code, bi.created_at, bi.updated_at FROM bom_item bi INNER JOIN bom_tree bt ON bi.parent_code = bt.item_code ) SELECT id, item_code, item_name, unit, quantity, unit_price, level, parent_code, created_at, updated_at FROM bom_tree
